description: Updated task structure based on TASK-001 assessment - EchoPages Journal is 85% complete and ready for launch preparation

tasks.title: Project Status Assessment and Gap Analysis
tasks.description: Conduct comprehensive assessment of current implementation against PRD requirements
acceptanceCriteria: Complete audit of all implemented features vs PRD requirements
Identify missing functionality and technical debt
Document current architecture and code quality
Create prioritized list of remaining work items
Assess test coverage and identify gaps

subtasks.title: Feature Completeness Audit
subtasks.description: Systematically review each PRD requirement against current implementation

subtasks.title: Technical Architecture Review
subtasks.description: Assess current architecture against 2025 development guidelines

subtasks.title: Test Coverage Analysis
subtasks.description: Review existing tests and identify missing test scenarios

tasks.title: Development Environment Setup and Containerization
tasks.description: Implement containerized development environment following 2025 guidelines
acceptanceCriteria: Podman containerization setup with rootless containers

subtasks.title: Podman Container Setup
subtasks.description: Configure Podman with rootless containers for development

subtasks.title: Distrobox Development Shell
subtasks.description: Set up Distrobox with appropriate Linux distribution

subtasks.title: VS Code Dev Container Configuration
subtasks.description: Create devcontainer.json for seamless development experience

tasks.title: Universal Platform Implementation Completion
tasks.description: Ensure full platform parity across iOS, Android, macOS, Windows, and Web
acceptanceCriteria: All platforms have identical feature sets

subtasks.title: iOS/iPadOS Implementation Review
subtasks.description: Complete iOS implementation with Apple Human Interface Guidelines compliance

subtasks.title: Android Implementation Review
subtasks.description: Complete Android implementation with Material 3 Expressive compliance

subtasks.title: macOS Implementation Review
subtasks.description: Complete macOS implementation with native design patterns

subtasks.title: Windows Implementation Review
subtasks.description: Complete Windows implementation with Fluent Design System

subtasks.title: Web Implementation Review
subtasks.description: Complete web implementation with PWA features and responsive design

tasks.title: Security and Privacy Compliance Audit
tasks.description: Comprehensive security review and GDPR compliance verification
acceptanceCriteria: Privacy policy and terms of service

subtasks.title: Encryption Implementation Audit
subtasks.description: Verify AES-256 encryption implementation across all platforms

subtasks.title: Authentication Security Review
subtasks.description: Audit OAuth and biometric authentication implementations

subtasks.title: GDPR Compliance Verification
subtasks.description: Ensure all data handling meets GDPR requirements

tasks.title: Performance Optimization and Testing
tasks.description: Optimize application performance across all platforms

subtasks.description: Optimize battery usage and performance on iOS and Android

subtasks.title: Desktop Performance Optimization
subtasks.description: Optimize performance on macOS and Windows

subtasks.title: Web Performance Optimization
subtasks.description: Optimize web application performance and PWA features

tasks.title: Comprehensive Testing Implementation

acceptanceCriteria: Integration tests for all major features
E2E tests for critical user journeys

subtasks.description: Implement comprehensive unit tests for all components

subtasks.title: Integration Test Implementation
subtasks.description: Implement integration tests for API and database operations
